data.headline: Portfolio Down 0.026% vs SPY Up 0.052% — NVDA Position Underwater
data.summary: End-of-day portfolio value: $999,740.08 (down 0.026% from $1,000,000 start). Benchmark (SPY) returned +0.052%, resulting in -78.3 bps of underperformance (alpha). Single trade executed (1 total trade). Holdings: 117 shares of NVDA at $211.15/share (market value $24,704.55) with unrealized loss of -$258.92 due to mark price below $213.36 cost basis. Cash position: $975,035.53. No major realized losses. Risk: concentrated single-stock position; mark-to-market loss on NVDA reflects intraday weakness despite single trade decision.
data.risk_note: Concentrated NVDA holding (117 shares, ~2.47% of portfolio value) with negative mark-to-market. Single position exposure and limited diversification create concentration risk.
